response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings 17+ years of engineering experience with genuine distributed systems depth — including high-throughput microservices at Dunnhumby and current AI-agent infrastructure work — but the resume shows no evidence of the core technical domain this role requires: experimentation platforms, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, telemetry pipelines, or statistical growth analysis. The seniority bar is also unmet: Principal/IC6 demands demonstrated cross-team architectural ownership and org-wide platform influence, neither of which appears in the candidate's history.
strengths: Real distributed systems experience handling millions of HTTP requests/second at Dunnhumby, satisfying the high-availability and scale requirement
Polyglot background spanning JavaScript/TypeScript, C#, Java, and C/C++ covers the required language stack
Current AI-agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq aligns with the company's AI-first engineering culture
concerns: No mention of experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout automation — the central technical domain of this role
No evidence of telemetry infrastructure, metrics pipelines, or statistical/experimental analysis methods required for growth measurement
Career trajectory and demonstrated scope fall short of Principal/IC6: no cross-team platform ownership, no evidence of driving org-wide engineering systems across multiple teams
